zh.Saint-Clair-d'Arcey, Eure, Normandy, Fra: 法國豪-諾門迪艾沙吉可萊-達阿瑟
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Norman II d’Arcy於1065年出生在法國豪-諾門迪艾沙吉可萊-達阿瑟時，他的父親Norman d’Arcy34歲，母親Adelina A Court30歲。他於大約1090年與Mrs Norman Darcy在英國林可爾史爾諾可頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他於1066年登記服兵役。他去世於1118年在英國林可爾史爾享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Norman II d’Arcy于1065年出生在法国豪-諾門迪艾沙吉可萊-達阿瑟时，他的父亲Norman d’Arcy34岁，母亲Adelina A Court30岁。他于大约1090年与Mrs Norman Darcy在英国林可爾史爾諾可頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他于1066年登记服兵役。他去世于1118年在英国林可爾史爾享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: d’Arcy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Brendan, Eamonn, Maeve, Malachy, Niamh, Seamus.  French Gisele, Julien, Normand, Alain, Armand, Cecile, Clemence, Dominique, Emile, Gilles, Jean-Paul, Laure.
English (Lancashire) and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Arcy in Manche, France, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’.

Irish: in Ireland, this is generally the Norman name (see 1 above), established in Meath by Sir William D'Arcy in the 1360s, but it was also adopted for Ó Dorchaidhe ‘descendant of the dark one’, from dorcha ‘dark, gloomy’, a Connacht name that fell together with the Norman surname, which was introduced by Sir William D'Arcy and Sir John D'Arcy, Chief Justiciar of Ireland in the 14th century.

variants.name: Darcey
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and Irish (Tipperary): variant of   Darcy  .

nameMeanings.name: Norman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, from nord ‘north’ + man ‘man’, i.e. ‘Norseman’. This name was in use in England before the Conquest, and was reinforced by its use among the Norman invaders themselves. The Normans were the inhabitants of Normandy in northern France, whose name is a reference to the Vikings who took control of the region in the 9th century. In the 11th and 12th centuries they achieved remarkable conquests, including not only Britain but also Sicily, southern Italy, and Antioch. In the Scottish Highlands it is used as the Anglicized equivalent of Tormod .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Norman II d’Arcy was born in 1065, in Saint-Clair-d'Arcey, Eure, Upper Normandy, France, his father, Norman d’Arcy, was 34 and his mother, Adelina A Court, was 30. He married Mrs Norman Darcy about 1090, in Nocton, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He registered for military service in 1066. He died in 1118, in Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Norman II d’Arcy est né en 1065, à Saint-Clair-d'Arcey, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Norman d’Arcy, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Adelina A Court, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Norman Darcy environ 1090, à Nocton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1066. Il est décédé en 1118, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Norman II d’Arcy 1065 in Saint-Clair-d'Arcey, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Norman d’Arcy 34 und seine Mutter Adelina A Court 30. Er hat um 1090 in Nocton, Lincolnshire, England Mrs Norman Darcy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er hat sich 1066 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1118 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Norman II d’Arcy è nato il nel 1065 nel Saint-Clair-d'Arcey, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Norman d’Arcy, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Adelina A Court, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Mrs Norman Darcy circa 1090, nel Nocton, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1066. Morì nel 1118, nel Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Norman II d’Arcyが1065年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアサイント-クレイル-ド'アルセイで生まれた時，父Norman d’Arcyは34歳，母Adelina A Courtは30歳であった。約1090年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアノクトンでMrs Norman Darcyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1066年に兵役登録をした。彼は1118年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Norman II d’Arcy(이)가 1065년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 세인트-c레이-드'아르스이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Norman d’Arcy(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelina A Court(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1090년 영국 링코실르 노크턴에서 Mrs Norman Darcy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1066년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1118년 영국 링코실르에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Nocton, York, England: Eoforwic, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Norman II d’Arcy nasceu em 1065, em Saint-Clair-d'Arcey, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Norman d’Arcy, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Adelina A Court, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs Norman Darcy aproximadamente 1090, em Nocton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1066. Ele faleceu em 1118, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Norman II d’Arcy родился в 1065 г. в местности сеинт-клеир-д'арси, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Norman d’Arcy было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Adelina A Court, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Norman Darcy около 1090 г. в местности ноктон, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. В 1066 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1118 г. в местности линколншир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord Norman II d’Arcy nació en 1065, en Saint-Clair-d'Arcey, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Norman d’Arcy, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Adelina A Court, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Mrs Norman Darcy aproximadamente 1090, en Nocton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1066. Murió en 1118, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años.
